title: Fetching Data with useEffect
description: Make API calls and handle loading/error states.

slides.title: Fetching Data Pattern 📡
Using async/await
slides.content: You can't make the effect function itself `async`, but you can define an inner function:

slides.title: Important ⚠️

quizData.question: Why do we need a cleanup flag (like `ignore`) when fetching data in useEffect?

options.text: To avoid setting state on an unmounted component
To make the fetch run only once

quizData.explanation: If the component unmounts before the fetch resolves, setting state would cause a warning and potential memory leak. The flag prevents that.
